overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail decorated with colorful banners, passing horse riders, and walking alongside a scenic mountain lake before returning to the wooded path. The scene features lush summer vegetation, dappled sunlight, and transitions between dense forest and open lakeside views.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching a horse camp with decorative banners

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching the horse riders ahead
large white horse temporarily blocks the left side of the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward a group of horse riders standing near decorative banners

notable_agents.action: rider standing beside a white horse on the left edge of the path
second rider with horse standing in the center of the trail ahead

entered.detail: dense coniferous trees surrounding the path on all sides
worn dirt path winding through the forest with grass edges
colorful triangular flags strung on ropes across the path ahead
snow-capped mountain visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-dappled forest trail with tall pine trees surrounding the path. The character approaches a group of stationary horse riders standing near decorative banners strung across the path ahead. A snow-capped mountain is visible in the distant background through the trees.

events.description: lake water becomes visible through the trees on the right side
path curves gently to the right toward the lakeshore

agents.ego_description: passing under the overhead banner decorations and approaching the lakeshore

entered.detail: calm reflective lake surface visible through gaps in the trees
small wooden pier structure extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: The character passes directly under the colorful banner decorations strung overhead as the path opens toward a lakeside view. The horse riders are left behind as the trail curves right, revealing a calm lake with a wooden dock visible in the distance through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside walking path with mountain backdrop

events.description: emerging from tree cover into bright direct sunlight reflecting off the lake surface
small bird flies overhead across the lake view

agents.ego_description: walking along the scenic lakeshore path with water to the right and forested cliffs across the lake

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts lining the edge of the water
steep rocky mountain face rising across the lake

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright, sunlit lakeside path with the water now directly alongside the trail. Wooden fence posts line the water's edge while a steep mountain cliff rises across the lake. The forest that previously surrounded the path now forms a dense wall only on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to banner-decorated forest trail leading to darker woods

events.description: turning away from the lake back into the forested path
entering darker forest interior with denser canopy cover overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path back under banner decorations and proceeding into deeper, darker woodland

entered.detail: colorful triangular banners hanging overhead marking the forest path
thick dense tree cover creating a shaded, darker area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the lake and re-enters the forest, passing once more under the decorative banners. The trail continues into progressively darker woodland as the tree canopy thickens overhead, obscuring the sky and creating a more enclosed, shaded environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sun-dappled forest trail, opening onto a bright lakeside vista before receding back into the shaded depths of the woods. It begins among tall pine trees and stationary horse riders, moving toward decorative banners that stretch across the path with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. As the camera passes under these colorful banners, the trail curves right and the dense forest gives way to a calm lake featuring a distant wooden dock. The scene then expands into a bright, sunlit path where the water runs directly alongside wooden fence posts, contrasted by a steep mountain cliff rising across the lake. Finally, the camera turns away from the water and re-enters the forest under the banners once more, moving into progressively darker woodland as the thickening canopy obscures the sky.
